ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company placing the order */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the order is being shipped */,
  "ship_city" TEXT /* City where the order is being shipped */,
  "ship_address" TEXT /* Address where the order is being shipped */,
  "company_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company agent handling the order */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current status of the order */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "subtotal" TEXT /* Subtotal of the order */,
  "tax" TEXT /* Tax amount of the order */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipment */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to track active or cancelled orders */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_company_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_agent_id") REFERENCES company_agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES order_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES order_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the company agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the company agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company agent */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the agent belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the company agent */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the company agent */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the agent's last login */,
  "last_login_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the agent's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the company */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the company */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the order status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order status */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag to track if the status is the default status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the order type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping log */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order the log belongs to */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the shipping activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of shipping activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the shipping activity */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company agent who performed the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_logs_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_logs_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES company_agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order the comment belongs to */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment or note */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company agent who made the comment */,
  "is_internal" INTEGER /* Flag to track if the comment is internal or external */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_comments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_comments_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES company_agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_permissions" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company agent */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the agent */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission assigned to the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id", "role_id", "permission_id")
)
